title: Guns Without Roses 3D by Shawdy3
description: 3d weapons for Guns Without Roses with my vision
body:
**!!! [Guns Winthout Roses](https://modrinth.com/mod/guns-without-roses) MOD IS REQUIRED !!!**   
## what replaces this resource pack?
- The models of iron and gold pistols have been redesigned to look more like a revolver
- The diamond shotgun and sniper rifle have become more like a shotgun and a sniper rifle XD
- Diamond Gatling has been redesigned and now it's Tommy Gun, just because it's more old-fashioned and cool.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f03fcbae7f2a6835e8d63bed913ec8cfe27c1315.jpeg)

Someday later, I'll make a model for Blaze Gun.
